Home.heroBody: Silver and gold worked by hand, lost-wax cast. When a piece sells, it is not made again.
Home.ethosBody: Every piece is lost-wax cast and finished by hand in the atelier. No two are alike and none are remade: what you see is what there is.

Footer.tagline: Author jewelry atelier. One-of-a-kind pieces, lost-wax cast.

Shop.title: Shop
Shop.intro: One-of-a-kind pieces, available while they last.
Shop.emptyBody: The atelier is preparing the next collection — check back soon.
Shop.emptyCategoryBody: No pieces in this category yet.

ProductDetail.notFoundBody: The link may be broken, or the piece was removed from the catalog.

Cart.title: Cart
Cart.emptyBody: Browse the shop to find your next unique piece.
Cart.errorRetry: Payment could not start. Please try again.

Checkout.successBody: Your piece is confirmed. The atelier will reach out with shipping details.

About.title: Every piece begins in wax.
About.intro: nerea is a one-person atelier. Every piece is designed, cast, and finished by hand, start to finish.
About.processBody: The technique is lost-wax casting: the piece is first carved in wax, cast in .925 silver or 14k gold, then finished by hand — polishing, texture, and stone-setting, one at a time.
About.materialsBody: Silver, gold, and a selection of natural stones, chosen for character rather than uniformity. The process is slow on purpose: a piece leaves the atelier when it's ready, not before.

Contact.title: Write to the atelier.
Contact.intro: Every message is read and answered directly from the atelier — no intermediaries.
Contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about the piece you're looking for…
Contact.successBody: Thank you for writing — the artisan will reply personally as soon as she can.
